_exempt: <!-- PRIMARY-SOURCE-EXEMPT: reason=QA-KG taxonomy authority cert; declares semantic-coord lattice grounded in QA_AXIOMS_BLOCK.md + QA_OBSERVER_PROJECTION_COMPLIANCE_SPEC.v1.md -->
scope_note: QA Semantic Coord Cert family [226]: authority doc for the QA-KG node classifier. Declares the 9x9 semantic lattice (foundation x contribution) grounded in canonical QA. Foundation axis (b) maps to the seven axiom groups (A/T/S/F) + generator algebra + invariant packet + orbit classification + external mapping + meta/self-reference. Contribution axis (e) maps to definition/theorem/bridge/witness/obstruction/validator/generator/rule/meta. The classifier classify_node(foundation, contribution) is the declared observer per Theorem NT causal order step 2. Orbit tier is DERIVED from (b,e) via qa_orbit_rules.orbit_family — never assigned independently. Singularity (9,9) = axiomatic self-grounding (the seven QA axioms). Satellite 3|b AND 3|e = structural meta/validator cells. Cosmos = working knowledge lattice. b=e diagonal = self-grounding (STF/Sierpinski per project_qa_be_diagonal_stf_canonical.md). Paired with cert [225] QA_KG_CONSISTENCY_CERT whose KG6 invariant enforces every Cosmos/Satellite/Singularity node carries a canonical (foundation, contribution) classification. Source: QA_AXIOMS_BLOCK.md, QA_OBSERVER_PROJECTION_COMPLIANCE_SPEC.v1.md, qa_canonical.md, qa_orbit_rules.py, reference_qa_human_needs_mapping.md (b=certainty, e=variety, d=significance, a=connection — Will's canonical 2026-04-01).
